input: The meeting is at 2 PM. No wait, 3 PM, in the main conference room.
ideal: The meeting is at 3 PM in the main conference room.

input: We're using version 2.1. Wait, 2.4, which has the bug fix we need.
ideal: We're using version 2.4 which has the bug fix we need.

input: The repo is at github.com slash acme. Actually, github.com slash apex, slash widgets.
ideal: The repo is at github.com/apex/widgets.

input: She joined in January. No, February, and hit the ground running.
ideal: She joined in February and hit the ground running.

input: The limit is 100 requests. Wait, 500 requests, per minute for paid tiers.
ideal: The limit is 500 requests per minute for paid tiers.

input: It's running on port 8080. Actually, 3000, which is what the docs say.
ideal: It's running on port 3000 which is what the docs say.

input: The package is lodash. No wait, underscore, which is lighter weight.
ideal: The package is underscore which is lighter weight.

input: He graduated in 2018. Actually, 2019, with a degree in computer science.
ideal: He graduated in 2019 with a degree in computer science.

input: The endpoint returns 50 items. Wait, 20 items, per page by default.
ideal: The endpoint returns 20 items per page by default.

input: The file is in slash temp. No, slash var, slash log, slash myapp.
ideal: The file is in /var/log/myapp.

input: It costs forty bucks. Wait, thirty-five, if you buy before Friday.
ideal: It costs thirty-five bucks if you buy before Friday.

input: The schema uses varchar 255. Actually, varchar 512, for the description field.
ideal: The schema uses varchar 512 for the description field.

input: She's been here since March. No, April, and she's already leading projects.
ideal: She's been here since April and she's already leading projects.

input: The build takes ten minutes. Wait, six minutes, on the new M3 Macs.
ideal: The build takes six minutes on the new M3 Macs.

input: The meeting is with Sarah. No, Jessica, from the design team.
ideal: The meeting is with Jessica from the design team.

input: We're targeting Python 3.9. Actually, 3.11, for better async support.
ideal: We're targeting Python 3.11 for better async support.

input: The flight leaves at 6 PM. Wait, 7:30 PM, so we have more time.
ideal: The flight leaves at 7:30 PM so we have more time.

input: He's moving to Austin. No, Denver, in early September.
ideal: He's moving to Denver in early September.

input: The discount is 10 percent. Actually, 15 percent, if you sign up today.
ideal: The discount is 15 percent if you sign up today.

input: The repo is at github.com slash acme. Wait, slash acme-corp, slash api.
ideal: The repo is at github.com/acme-corp/api.

input: She graduated in 2017. No, 2018, and started here right after.
ideal: She graduated in 2018 and started here right after.

input: The package weighs 2 kilos. Actually, 2.5 kilos, so shipping costs more.
ideal: The package weighs 2.5 kilos so shipping costs more.

input: The keynote is by Dr. Chen. Wait, Dr. Patel, from MIT.
ideal: The keynote is by Dr. Patel from MIT.

ideal: We're using React 18 with the new concurrent features.
